blockers.description: VERCEL_TOKEN not stored in environment. Atlas cannot trigger manual deploys or verify env vars without browser auth.
blockers.action: Go to vercel.com/account/tokens → Create Personal Access Token → Add to ~/.openclaw/.env as VERCEL_TOKEN=<token>. Verify: echo $VERCEL_TOKEN should output token.

blockers.description: OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch blocking local dev auth flow. 127.0.0.1 callback not registered in Google Cloud Console.
blockers.action: Go to console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client IDs → Add http://127.0.0.1:PORT to Authorized redirect URIs. Save. Test callback.
